escalatedRisks.risk: 🎉🎉🎉 DDR5 spot $46.000 — SEVENTEEN consecutive ATH — 4-DAY MARKET CLOSURE pressure buildup. Tonight June 22 session tests $46 support and $47 direction.
escalatedRisks.status: ACCELERATING — June 22 09:45 refresh。June 18 session confirmed $46.000 (17th ATH)。Largest single-session gain (+$0.767, +1.70%)。Market closed June 19-22 (Dragon Boat Festival + weekend) = 4 consecutive days without session。Tonight ~18:00 CST session will test $46 support。Pressure buildup intensified by four-day closure. $47 only $1.000 away. DDR4 16Gb $69.125 / DDR3 $10.976 also awaiting tonight update.
escalatedRisks.source: DRAMeXchange June 18, 2026 session + web search verification June 22
escalatedRisks.detail: DDR5 spot at $46.000 on June 18 — 17th consecutive ATH session。Four-day market closure (6/19-22) = unprecedented session gap for this observation period。Combined with DDR4 16Gb at $69.125 and DDR3 at $10.976, all three DRAM generations in synchronized acceleration。Tonight's session is pivotal — $47 test directly after extended closure could trigger retail repricing wave。

escalatedRisks.risk: 🔴→🟢🟢🟢 WF6 SUPPLY CRISIS RESOLVED — Kanto Denka + Central Glass suspended July 1 permanent shutdown on June 19 after securing Chinese tungsten export quota allocations.
escalatedRisks.status: RESOLVED (DOWNGRADED from CRITICAL to ELEVATED) — June 22, 2026 09:45 refresh。Japanese WF6 producers secured 'directed supply support through export quota allocations for Chinese tungsten powder' announced June 19。Previously expected 2,200 tons/year (~25% global capacity) gap AVOIDED。Physical supply cutoff removed。WF6 prices remain elevated (+200% YoY, +203% MoM in April) but no longer facing physical supply disruption。Underlying vulnerability persists: China controls ~80% global tungsten supply, alternatives require 12-18 month qualification。Korean suppliers (SK Specialty/Foosung) 70-90% H2 2026 price increases may be revisited/reduced。
escalatedRisks.previousStatus: CRITICAL — 10 days to July 1 permanent shutdown。2,200 tons/year gap = ~25% of global WF6 capacity。
escalatedRisks.source: Hualihg / 36kr / BigGo / TrendForce / multiple sources June 19-22, 2026
escalatedRisks.detail: This is the single most significant risk resolution since Day 1 of tracking。The 'dual supply contraction' (MLC + WF6) narrative that dominated analysis for 12+ days is now officially dissolved。Only MLC NAND exit (8 days) remains as structural NAND supply risk。Korean WF6 price increases may be revised downward but remain to be confirmed。12-18 month qualification for alternatives means market remains structurally tight but no longer facing imminent physical cutoff。

escalatedRisks.risk: 🔴🔴 Newegg 9550 Pro 30.72TB OOS Day 15 — TWO WEEKS + 1 DAY. Structural retail OOS irreversible. Samsung PM1763 PCIe Gen6 launch adds medium-term technology transition pressure. CDW dual-SKU split confirmed.
escalatedRisks.status: CRITICAL — June 22, 2026 09:45 refresh。Newegg 9550 Pro retail flagship OOS for 15 consecutive days — entering third work week。CDW consumer #8215729 '8-10+ Days' maintained — trend improving。CDW #8455187 10-pack Backordered Day 14 — dual-SKU split confirmed by web search。SS $17,700 Day 49 sole reliable in-stock anchor。SHI $21,529 Backordered Day 27 confirmed。CDW-G and SHI #2 ($20,496) statuses unverified。Wiredzone In Stock (Email For Price) confirmed。Thinkmate $20,726 new channel。Samsung PM1763 PCIe Gen6 SSD (28,400MB/s) — medium-term pressure on PCIe5 pricing。
escalatedRisks.source: Newegg.com / CDW.com / SHI.com / Wiredzone / Samsung semiconductor / Thinkmate June 22, 2026
escalatedRisks.detail: Day 15 = two weeks + 1 day → structural OOS for retail channel firmly irreversible。CDW improvement to '8-10+ Days' represents continued recovery but still not immediate availability。Dual-SKU split (consumer 8-10d vs 10-pack backordered) confirms enterprise volume channel still tight。Samsung PM1763 Gen6 launch introduces technology transition risk for PCIe5 TLC holding value medium-term。WF6 resolution reduces supply urgency — split_buy replaces buy_now。

escalatedRisks.risk: 🔴🔴 DDR4 16Gb $69.125 (+1.47%) largest gain — approaching $70 psychological level. DDR3 $10.976 (+1.10%) accelerating Day 11. Three-generation DRAM synchronized supercycle. Awaiting tonight's session update.
escalatedRisks.status: ACCELERATING - June 22, 2026 (data from June 18 session)。DDR4 16Gb single-session +$1.000 = +1.47%。5th consecutive day outpacing DDR5。June-to-date +$8.025 (+13.1%)。DDR4 8Gb $35.900 (+0.28%) third day recovery。DDR3 +1.10% Day 11 acceleration。Tonight's session will provide first update after 4-day closure。Three-generation synchronized bull market unprecedented in breadth and velocity。$70 DDR4 16Gb imminent。
escalatedRisks.detail: The DDR4 16Gb→DDR5 outperformance is now 5 days old with accelerating magnitude。DDR4 8Gb recovery third consecutive day confirms consumer-side correction exhausted。DDR3's +1.10% shows DDR4→DDR3 spillover deepening into second week。All three DRAM generations in synchronized acceleration — historically unprecedented breadth。Tonight's session will confirm whether this momentum continued or consolidated during the 4-day closure。

escalatedRisks.risk: 🔴 MLC NAND ending June 2026 — FINAL 8 DAYS。Last remaining structural NAND supply risk after WF6 resolution。Samsung Line 12 (Hwaseong) 2D NAND→HBM4 DRAM conversion confirmed。Global MLC capacity -41.7% in 2026。MLC spot tripled 300%+ since late 2025。
escalatedRisks.status: SUSTAINED — June 22, 2026。Final 8 days of MLC NAND production。Samsung Line 12 ceased 2D NAND March 2026, physically converted to HBM4 DRAM。After WF6 crisis resolution (June 19), MLC exit becomes the sole remaining structural NAND supply risk — no longer part of a 'dual contraction' but still significant。Kioxia full 2D NAND exit by 2029。Micron curtailing MLC to existing commitments only。MLC spot prices tripled 300%+ since late 2025。
escalatedRisks.detail: Samsung Line 12 ceased 2D NAND production March 2026, physically converted to HBM4。MLC NAND final shipments June 2026 — only 8 days remain。With WF6 crisis resolved, MLC exit is now the sole structural NAND supply cut — reduced urgency from 'dual contraction' peak but still material。8 days to act before this supply source permanently offline。

escalatedRisks.risk: ⏳ Micron June 24 earnings (2 DAYS) — most important memory event of the year. Consensus $34.52B/$19.72EPS/~81%GM. MU ATH $1,133.99 (+297% YTD). 247WallSt June 21 warns sell-the-news risk: if results only meet guidance ($33.5B) not beat by 4%+, stock may sell off.
escalatedRisks.status: UPCOMING - 2 days (June 24, 2026)。Street consensus above guidance ($34.52B vs $33.5B guide)。MU hit ATH $1,133.99 on June 18。HBM 2026 fully sold out。Capex >$25B。FY2027 construction spending >$10B。High expectations = sell-the-news risk elevated (247WallSt 6/21)。Key: FY2027 capex, HBM ramp trajectory, NAND ASP outlook, 9650 PCIe Gen6 SSD detail, WF6-related commentary。WF6 crisis resolution may affect NAND ASP guidance。Analyst range: $19.68B-$40.07B revenue highlights extreme modeling uncertainty。
escalatedRisks.source: Micron IR / MarketBeat / Alphastreet / Zacks / 247WallSt (June 21) / multiple analysts June 2026
escalatedRisks.detail: Micron Q3 FY2026 earnings June 24 — the single most important memory industry event of the year。Capex raise to >$25B confirms structural supply shortage。With WF6 crisis resolved 5 days before earnings, management may provide updated NAND supply/demand outlook。247WallSt warns that meeting guidance (not beating) = sell-the-news。Key questions: (1) FY2027 capex guidance, (2) HBM4 ramp status, (3) NAND ASP trajectory post-WF6 resolution, (4) 9650 PCIe Gen6 SSD timeline。

escalatedRisks.status: ACCELERATING - June 22, 2026 (data from June 18 session)。DDR3 spot +1.10% on June 18 (from $10.857 on June 16)。Now 11 days of confirmed DDR4→DDR3 spillover with acceleration。All three DRAM generations in synchronized acceleration: DDR5 $46.000 +1.70%, DDR4 16Gb +1.47%, DDR4 8Gb +0.28% (recovery), DDR3 +1.10%。Tonight's session provides first update since June 18。Next resistance: DDR4 16Gb $70 / DDR5 $47 / DDR3 $11。

escalatedRisks.risk: 🆕 Samsung PM1763 PCIe Gen6 SSD launched early 2026 (4TB-64TB, 28,400MB/s read, ~25W)。Medium-term technology transition risk for PCIe5 TLC products. Samsung also planning 256TB PCIe Gen5 in 2026, 512TB PCIe Gen6 in 2027. Combined with WF6 resolution, this downgrades PCIe5 TLC procurement urgency.
escalatedRisks.status: NEW TRACKING ITEM — June 22, 2026 quantified。Samsung PM1763 PCIe Gen6 enterprise SSD confirmed launched early 2026。Available in E1.S, E3.S, U.2 form factors, capacities 4TB-64TB。Sequential read up to 28,400 MB/s (2x PM1743 Gen5), ~25W power, 60% better energy efficiency vs PCIe5 predecessors。NVMe 2.1/OCP 2.6/TDISP/SPDM/PQC compliant。Samsung also planning 256TB PCIe Gen5 solutions in 2026 and 512TB PCIe Gen6 in 2027。May pressure PCIe5 TLC (PM1743) pricing as Gen6 supply ramps through H2 2026。
escalatedRisks.source: Samsung Semiconductor / Wccftech / TechPowerUp / TechRadar / Club386 / Saitech June 2026
escalatedRisks.detail: The PM1763 launch represents the beginning of the PCIe Gen6 enterprise SSD transition。While Gen6 adoption will be gradual (platform compatibility, qualification cycles), it introduces medium-term technology obsolescence risk for PCIe5 products。Combined with WF6 resolution (reducing supply-side urgency), this adds to the case for split_buy rather than panic_buy on PCIe5 TLC products。28,400MB/s vs PM1743 ~14,000MB/s = 2x throughput advantage。

escalatedRisks.risk: 🆕 CDW 9550 Pro dual-SKU split confirmed — consumer #8215729 8-10+Days vs 10-pack #8455187 Backordered Day 14。Enterprise volume channel tight, consumer singles improving。
escalatedRisks.status: MONITORING — June 22, 2026 web verification。CDW consumer #8215729 '8-10+ Days' confirmed。CDW #8455187 10-pack Backordered Day 14 confirmed。Dual-SKU divergence suggests enterprise volume procurement remains heavily constrained while single-unit consumer fulfillment is loosening。SHI $21,529 Backordered Day 27 (enterprise channel) independently confirms volume tightness。
escalatedRisks.detail: The consumer/volume CDW split is a microcosm of the broader PCIe5 TLC market: singles are becoming available (8-10d) but bulk procurement remains locked (Backordered 'cannot guarantee in-stock date')。This pattern supports split_buy — execute what's available now while awaiting further supply loosening。
